name: python3-libfsntfs
title: python3-libfsntfs
description:
NTFS access library -- Python 3 bindings
NTFS is the primary file system for Microsoft Windows versions that
are based on Windows NT. libfsntfs provides a library and tools to
access NTFS volumes.
.
This package includes Python 3 bindings.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libfsntfs because NTFS access library -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libfsntfs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libfsntfs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libfsntfs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
